n: Intro: The Wolves of the Ruins

steps.t: Wolves can be found near Archet, and seem to be most concentrated around Bronwe's Folly. Calder Cob, a trusted soldier of Captain Brackenbrook, has as…
You found a strange banner atop the ruins at Bronwe's Folly. You should take a closer look at this banner....
Calder Cob stands at the farm just down the road from Archet. Before you go back to Strider, you should ask him why he tried to have you ambushed by B…
